(Translated by Google)
The players are terrible, totally unmotivated! They just chat away and when you push them, they don't like it! It's awful, then they lose their jobs and don't know why.

reviews.comment:
Pésimo no solo te faltan el respeto , no te dan factura y tenés que bancarte que el playero charle y este dos horas con uno que llegó después que vos ! Pésimo! Hoy 01/02 a las 21:45 . Miren las cámaras y van a ver x que se llenan de colas interminables !!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! Not only are they disrespectful, they don't give you a receipt, and you have to put up with the attendant chatting and spending two hours with someone who arrived after you! Awful! Today, February 1st, at 9:45 PM. Check the security cameras and you'll see why there are endless lines!

reviews.comment:
Hace dos semanas 16 enero de 2023 tipo 00:30hs cargue combustible infinia diésel por un valor de $6600 el empleado me  dijo q no habia sistema para la carga de puntos q me lo cargaría cdo tenga sistema en el futuro ayer fui a cargar 29/01/2023 y le pedí q me cargue esos puntos y me dijo q no podía cargarlos porque no tenia cupo q cuando lo tenga lo haría y le deje el comprobante sellado por el mismo q me entregó hace dos semana  atras y me cargo punto por diésel 500 y no infinia diésel lo cual son menos puntos acumulados para canjearlos,  lo q no me gusto es la atención por parte del empleado de ese turno q comenzó a las 23 hs y el verso que hizo para no cargar los puntos que corresponden, muy mal servicio del ACA de La Rioja Capita, deberian elegir mejor los empleadosl

(Translated by Google)
Two weeks ago, on January 16, 2023, at approximately 12:30 AM, I filled up with Infinia Diesel fuel worth $6600. The employee told me the system for adding points was down and that he would add them when the system was working again in the future. Yesterday, on January 29, 2023, I went back to fill up and asked him to add those points. He told me he couldn't because he didn't have enough credit, but that he would do it when he did. I left him the receipt stamped by the same employee who gave me the previous two weeks, but he added 500 points for Diesel instead of Infinia Diesel, which means fewer points to redeem. What I didn't like was the service from the employee on that shift, which started at 11 PM, and the excuse he gave for not adding the correct points. Very poor service from the ACA in La Rioja Capital; they should choose their employees better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNTQ3LUx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Quise canjear la pelota de messi, y dsps de cargar la cantidad de nafta que pedía la promo me dijeron que solo la canjeaban por 7mil puntos!!!, además de que no me cargaron los puntos de la nafta que cargue......😡😡😡😡😡

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to redeem the Messi ball, and after filling up with the amount of gas the promotion required, they told me they would only redeem it for 7,000 points!!! Plus, they didn't credit me with the points for the gas I bought... 😡😡😡😡😡
